title: Risk management action milestones for chemicals in the Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Risk management action milestones for chemicals in the Challenge

## This page has been archived on the Web
Information identified as archived is provided for reference, research or recordkeeping purposes. It is not subject to the Government of Canada Web Standards and has not been altered or updated since it was archived. Please contact us to request a format other than those available.
The substances listed below link to tables that outline the proposed risk management actions for those chemical substances in the Challenge that have met one or more criteria in section 64 of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 . For the complete wording of these proposed actions, please refer to the risk management approach documents listed on the relevant batch pages. An updated summary of Chemical Management Plan (CMP) risk management instruments is available on the CMP risk management actions table .
- Substances in Batch 1 CAS No. 75-56-9: Methyloxirane CAS No. 91-08-7, 584-84-9 & 26471-62-5: TDIs CAS No. 91-20-3: Naphthalene CAS No. 106-88-7: Ethyloxirane CAS No. 120-80-9: Catechol CAS No. 123-31-9: Hydroquinone
